title: PR #42106 — perps chart x-axis local timezone & locale-aware formatters
description: Navigates to BTC market detail, waits for the candlestick chart to render, captures the default-zoom chart (proves AC1 local-tz x-axis labels, AC5 day month/day, AC6 time HH:MM with date prefix when non-today), triggers a synthetic crosshair pointer to capture AC2 crosshair tooltip, and runs an in-page Intl probe to corroborate AC3/AC4 (year & month formatters yield expected output for the active locale).

ac1-assert-locale-formatter.expression: (() => { const tz = Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone; const f = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit', hour12:false, timeZone: tz}); const sample = f.format(new Date(1742048400 * 1000)); return JSON.stringify({tz, sample, hourCycle: f.resolvedOptions().hourCycle}); })()

ac2-trigger-crosshair.expression: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="perps-candlestick-chart"]'); if (!el) return JSON.stringify({ok:false, err:'no chart el'}); const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); const cx = r.left + r.width * 0.5; const cy = r.top + r.height * 0.4; const opts = { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, view: window, clientX: cx, clientY: cy }; el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseenter', opts)); el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseover', opts)); el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousemove', opts)); return JSON.stringify({ok:true, cx, cy, w: r.width, h: r.height}); })()

ac3-probe-year-formatter.expression: (() => { const fmt = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(navigator.language, {year:'numeric'}); const v = fmt.format(new Date(1742048400 * 1000)); return JSON.stringify({locale: navigator.language, value: v}); })()

ac4-probe-month-formatter.expression: (() => { const fmt = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(navigator.language, {month:'short'}); const v = fmt.format(new Date(1742048400 * 1000)); return JSON.stringify({locale: navigator.language, value: v}); })()
